reason: Successfully verified that the agent can open a browser, navigate to https://example.com, and retrieve the page title "Example Domain"
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Page loaded successfully showing Super Agent interface with list of agents in sidebar
Found and clicked on agent "QA-20260331-205056-8q8m" in the sidebar - Agent chat interface opened with message input field
Typed message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." into the input field - Message displayed correctly in input box
Sent message using Cmd+Enter - Message submitted and agent status changed from "idle" to "working"
Waited up to 3 minutes for agent response - Agent completed task in 14 seconds, displaying multiple tool calls:

Verified response mentions "Example Domain" - Agent response clearly states: "The page title is Example Domain. It's a simple page with a 'Learn more' link pointing to IANA's documentation about reserved example domains."
